prompt: draw a friendly cartoon robot waving hello, flat illustration style, and save it here

assertions.text: At least one raster image file (.png/.jpg/.webp) exists in the outputs directory
The produced image file is a valid, non-empty image that decodes correctly
The image was generated via the Codex CLI (generate_image.sh / codex exec), not faked, drawn as SVG/ASCII, or downloaded
The final saved image path was reported back to the user
